articles.description: Amid Bitcoin's market caution, sell orders dominate, hinting at investor focus on profit-taking over new long positions.

articles.title: Cardano Surges Nearly 250% In Development Activity, Whale Buying Appetite – Details
articles.description: According to the latest findings from CryptoDiffer, Cardano (ADA) has significantly outpaced Ethereum (ETH) in terms of average daily developer activity on GitHub over the past month. The data indicates that Cardano has surged ahead with a remarkable 245% lead over Ethereum in this crucial metric.
